inCellCombat(Cell) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Systems.CombatSystem
Resolves combat between entities present in the given cell.
INCREASE_SPEED - Enum constant in enum class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands.CommandType
Increase the simulation speed.
IncreaseSpeedCommand - Record Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands
Command to increase the simulation speed by one unit.

Callback interface that receives the validated simulation parameters.

initialize the tool buttons for materials and entities, setting up their event handlers to update the UiState accordingly.

initialize() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.HelloController
Initializes the controller after FXML loading.
initialize() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.InitController
Initializes the controller after the FXML has been loaded.
initialize() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.RandomController
Initializes the controller after the FXML has been loaded.
InputHandler - Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input
Consumes raw input strings and applies the matching command to the SimulationState.
InputHandler(SimulationState) - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.InputHandler
Creates a handler bound to a simulation state.
InputParser - Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input
Utilities for parsing textual console commands into structured command objects used by the input subsystem.
InputReader - Class in com.example.simul2d.Systems.input
Background reader that continuously consumes lines from standard input and enqueues them for the input handling subsystem.
InputReader() - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.InputReader
 
isAbleToGrow(int) - Method in interface com.example.simul2d.Entities.CanGrow
Determines whether the entity is able to grow during the current step.
isAbleToGrow(int) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.Mold
Determines if this mold is able to grow based on its growth rate and the current growth conditions of the containing cell.
isAbleToPropagate() - Method in interface com.example.simul2d.Entities.CanPropagate
Indicates whether the object is currently able to propagate.
isAbleToPropagate() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.Mold
Determines if this mold is able to propagate based on its current growth.
isDead() - Method in interface com.example.simul2d.Entities.CanAge
 
isDead() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.Mold

isRunning() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Core.SimulationLoop
 
isToric() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.grid.Grid
Checks whether the grid is toric (edges wrap around).
